summary: First-finish smoke testing complete. Backend (4/4 endpoints) and Frontend (all sections + contact form) verified working. Resume PDF served correctly. Mobile viewport renders without overflow.
passed: POST /api/contact with valid payload returns 200 with status=success, id, email_sent=false (Resend testing mode - acceptable per spec)
POST /api/contact validation: missing fields -> 422, invalid email -> 422, empty strings -> 422
GET /api/contact returns 200 with array including the just-submitted message (sorted desc by timestamp)
Hero section shows 'Alex Chen', 'Senior Software Engineer', and both CTA buttons (hero-cta-work, hero-cta-contact)
All 5 nav links visible (about, skills, work, experience, contact) and clickable
Skills section renders 4 groups including Frontend, Backend, Databases, Cloud & DevOps
Projects section renders exactly 5 project cards
Contact form valid submission shows success toast/feedback
Contact form empty submission shows validation error feedback
Mobile viewport (375x812) renders without horizontal overflow; hero visible
notes: Test data-testids for contact form inputs are 'contact-input-name/email/message' (not 'contact-name-input' as listed in review request) - this matched the actual implementation and tests passed. Resend email_sent=false expected in testing mode; message correctly persisted to MongoDB.
